title: pandanus tectorius var. littoralis
intro: Pandanus tectorius var. littoralis, also known as the coastal pandanus or sea pandan, is a variety of plant native to tropical regions and is characterized by its distinctive feathery leaves and small, yellowish flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Pandanus tectorius var. littoralis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
